evaluation_protocol.one_shot_prompt_contract: The public spec exposes the complete interface, public transient contract, public observables, and coarse composed-flow behavior envelope without revealing checker internals or gold source.
evaluation_protocol.feedback_track_note: A future feedback/debug track should reuse task assets only under a separate runner protocol and separate pass@K score table.

notes: Public prompt is now a thin task wrapper; public/agent_visible_spec.md is the shared agent-visible behavior contract.
Public spec removes checker IDs and exact private threshold values.
Private gold artifacts are copied into v2 so the task is self-contained.
Private checker policy is behavior-first composed-flow; it does not require private variable names or a fixed implementation template.

private_diagnostics.private_threshold_policy: Use completed conversion count, visible trial-bit sequence, comparator agreement, code coverage, quantization error, DAC reconstruction error, and monotonicity guards.
private_diagnostics.gold_expectation: The private gold artifacts implement a sample/hold feeding an MSB-to-LSB SAR ADC and a binary-weighted DAC reconstruction path.

private_checker_contract.public_behavior_envelope: The public spec specifies a 20 us full-swing sine transient, visible sample/hold output, MSB-to-LSB SAR trial monitors, comparator/trial-DAC consistency, broad 8-bit code coverage, monotonic code relation to sampled input, and weighted DAC reconstruction in the 0 V to 0.9 V range.
private_checker_contract.implementation_constraints: No private variable names, exact state-machine structure, or fixed implementation template are required by the v2 checker.

directive: This release task card is private benchmark/evaluator metadata. Do not render it into agent prompts.
